description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 10, 2025 at 3:45 PM PT, a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in Los Angeles, CA was in a collision 
involving a pickup truck on Lyric Avenue at Claremont Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling south on a narrow stretch of Lyric Avenue when it detected a pickup truck traveling north on Lyric Avenue. 
The Waymo AV maneuvered to the right into a gap between parked cars on the west side of the roadway to allow the pickup truck to pass, 
and as the pickup truck passed, the rear left side of the pickup truck made contact with the rear left side of the Waymo AV. At the time of 
the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The pickup truck sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
